creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 165507
patch with update to 1.23.3

Hello,

attached a patch to update the port to its current version.

portlint is fine.

poudriere builds are fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.1 amd + i386
10.2 amd + i386
11-current r293820 amd + i386

I did also basic runtime tests. I use this port in different projects and they all work well after the update. :)

Greetings,
Torsten
